__comment__: This file was automatically created by mcresources
name: Glassworking

pages.text: Glassworking is the process of turning sand into glass. To start, you must create a $(thing)Glass Batch$(), of which there are four types:$(br)$(br) 1. $(thing)Silica$(), from white sand.$(br) 2. $(thing)Hematitic$(), from yellow, red, or pink sand.$(br) 3. $(thing)Olivine$(), from green or brown sand.$(br) 4. $(thing)Volcanic$(), from black sand.

pages.title: Silica Glass Batch
pages.text: 利用相應顏色的沙子製作玻璃原料，再加入 $(l:mechanics/glassworking#lime)石灰粉$() 以及任意 $(l:mechanics/glassworking#potash)鉀鹽粉末$()。
$(thing)石灰粉$()是製作玻璃原料的必要原料之一，可以$(l:mechanics/heating)加熱$()$(l:mechanics/flux)助焊劑$()取得。
製作玻璃原料還需要加入$(thing)鉀鹽粉末$()。可選用$(thing)碳酸鈉$()一種加熱$(thing)海草乾$()或$(thing)海帶$()取得的粉末或$(l:the_world/ores_and_minerals#saltpeter)硝石$()。

玻璃工藝由玻璃原料經過系列加工來完成，加工需要的專用工具：$(br)$(li)用於$(thing)吹氣$()和$(thing)拉伸$()的$(l:mechanics/glassworking#blowpipe)吹管$()；$(li)用於$(thing)壓平$()的$(l:mechanics/glassworking#paddle)整型板$()；$(li)用於$(thing)擠壓$()的$(l:mechanics/glassworking#jacks)整型鉗$()；$(li)用於$(thing)鋸割$()的$(l:mechanics/glassworking#saw)寶石鋸$()
pages.title: 玻璃工藝的工具

pages.text: 最重要的工具是$(thing)吹管$()。$(thing)捏製$()黏土製作出模具後燒製成$(thing)陶瓷吹管$()即可。
陶瓷吹管使用時容易碎裂。更可靠的吹管是從砧$(l:mechanics/anvils#working)加工$()$(thing)黃銅桿$()製作而成。
$(thing)整型板$()由木材加工製成，用來$(thing)壓平$()玻璃。
$(thing)整型鉗$()將兩根黃銅桿焊接製成，用來$(thing)擠壓$()玻璃。
$(thing)寶石鋸$()用來$(thing)切割$()玻璃。寶石鋸也被用來取下$(thing)玻璃方塊$()與$(thing)玻璃窗$()而不破壞它們。

First, glass on the blowpipe must be heated to $(4)$(bold)Faint Red$(). Then, hold the blowpipe in your $(thing)offhand$() and hold $(item)$(k:key.use)$() to perform each step$().$(br)Use $(item)$(k:key.swapOffhand)$() to pick up a hot blowpipe into your offhand.$(br2)$(bold)Blow$()$(br)Use the $(thing)Blowpipe$() while facing straight ahead.$(br2)$(bold)Stretch$()$(br)Use the $(thing)Blowpipe$() while facing straight down.
pages.title: 如何製作玻璃

pages.text: $(bold)Flatten$()$(br)Use the $(thing)Blowpipe$() while holding a $(l:mechanics/glassworking#paddle)Paddle$() in your main hand.$(br2)$(bold)Pinch$()$(br)Use the $(thing)Blowpipe$() while holding $(l:mechanics/glassworking#jacks)Jacks$() in your main hand.$(br2)$(bold)Saw$()$(br)Use the $(thing)Blowpipe$() while holding a $(l:mechanics/glassworking#saw)Gem Saw$() in your main hand.$(br2)$(bold)Roll$()$(br)Use the $(thing)Blowpipe$() with a $(l:mechanics/weaving#wool_cloth)Wool Cloth$() in your main hand.
